sections.title: Floor Opening and Open Sided Surface Inspection
sections.html:
Inspection Checklist

Inspection frequency note: Per 29 CFR 1926.20(b)(2) and WAC 296-880-050, regular and frequent inspections of the job site, materials, and equipment shall be made by competent persons.

sections.title: Floor Opening and Open Sided Surface Inspection (continued 3)
sections.html:
Regulatory Authority
OSHA: 29 CFR 1926 Subpart M; 29 CFR 1926.502(b) Guardrail Systems; 29 CFR 1926.502(i) Covers
WISHA: WAC 296-880 Unified Fall Protection covers floor openings open-sided surfaces and ramps
AGC: Safety and Health Manual Ch. 7 Fall Protection
This form supports compliance with the above regulations. Retain completed forms for minimum 3 years per 29 CFR 1904.33 and WAC 296-27.
